(Translated by Google)
Great inn with plenty of space to take a break on the way back from the coast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNndm95MG9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar agradable,  tenes todo.
Un lugar para estirar las piernas. Tenes una arboleda, podes estacionar hay mesas y bancos para hacer un pequeño recreo, que viene bien cuando viajas a la costa.
Podes comprar comida rápida,  tenes sanitarios limpios, hay una parrilla en la parte de atrás y además podes cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It's a nice place; it has everything you need.
A place to stretch your legs. There's a grove of trees, you can park, and there are tables and benches for a short break, which is nice when you're traveling to the coast.
You can buy fast food, there are clean restrooms, a grill in the back, and you can also fill up your car.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNVoyVjBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Está muy bien para parar de camino a la costa. Tiene un mini pelotero para que los chicos puedan correr un ratito mientras cargas combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It's a great place to stop on the way to the coast. It has a mini playpen so the kids can run around while you fill up with gas.
